description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS Inventory tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Master table for all inventory items defined in the system.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the item (Primary Key).

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Identifier for the organization where the item is defined.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: The item's number or code.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: The description of the item.

columns.name: PRIMARY_UOM_CODE
columns.description: The primary unit of measure for the item (e.g., EACH, KG).

columns.name: INVENTORY_ASSET_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the item is an asset (Y/N).

columns.name: STOCK_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the item can be stocked (Y/N).

tables.description: Stores detailed information about on-hand quantities for items in specific locations.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY_CODE
columns.description: The subinventory where the item is stored.

columns.name: LOCATOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS (The specific stock locator).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
columns.description: The quantity of items in this specific location.

columns.name: LOT_NUMBER
columns.description: Lot number for lot-controlled items.

columns.name: SERIAL_NUMBER
columns.description: Serial number for serial-controlled items.

tables.description: Stores information about subinventories within an inventory organization.

columns.name: SECONDARY_INVENTORY_NAME
columns.description: The name of the subinventory (Primary Key).

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization this subinventory belongs to (Primary Key).

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the subinventory.

tables.description: Stores information about specific stock locators (e.g., aisle, rack, bin) within a subinventory.

columns.name: INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the locator (Primary Key).

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY_CODE
columns.description: The subinventory where the locator exists.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: Segment 1 of the locator flexfield (e.g., Aisle).

columns.name: SEGMENT2
columns.description: Segment 2 of the locator flexfield (e.g., Rack).

columns.name: SEGMENT3
columns.description: Segment 3 of the locator flexfield (e.g., Bin).

tables.description: Stores a history of all material transactions, such as receipts, issues, and transfers.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the transaction (Primary Key).

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_DATE
columns.description: The date the transaction occurred.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Identifier for the type of transaction (e.g., PO Receipt, Sales Order Issue).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID
columns.description: Identifier for the transaction action (e.g., 1 = Issue from stores).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_QUANTITY
columns.description: The quantity transacted (can be positive or negative).

columns.name: PRIMARY_QUANTITY
columns.description: The quantity in the item's primary UOM.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID
columns.description: Link to the source of the transaction (e.g., PO_HEADER_ID).

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY_CODE
columns.description: The subinventory involved in the transaction.

tables.description: Defines the different types of material transactions.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the transaction type (Primary Key).

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
columns.description: The name of the transaction type (e.g., 'PO Receipt', 'Sales Order Issue').

tables.description: Stores default parameters and options for an inventory organization.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the inventory organization (Primary Key).

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_CODE
columns.description: The short code representing the inventory organization.

tables.description: Stores information about material reservations, which are holds placed on physical stock.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY_CODE
columns.description: The subinventory where the reservation is placed.

columns.name: PRIMARY_RESERVATION_QUANTITY
columns.description: The reserved quantity.

columns.name: REQUIREMENT_DATE
columns.description: The date by which the reservation is required.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: The date the reservation was created.

common_joins.description: Link On-Hand Quantity to Item Details
Link On-Hand Quantity to Stock Locator
Link Material Transaction to Transaction Type

example_queries.description: Get the total on-hand quantity for a specific item across all subinventories.
example_queries.sql: SELECT i.SEGMENT1, i.DESCRIPTION, SUM(d.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY) AS TOTAL_ONHAND FROM MTL_ONHAND_QUANTITIES_DETAIL d JOIN MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B i ON d.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = i.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AND d.ORGANIZATION_ID = i.ORGANIZATION_ID WHERE i.SEGMENT1 = :item_number GROUP BY i.SEGMENT1, i.DESCRIPTION

example_queries.description: Find where a specific item is located in the warehouse.
example_queries.sql: SELECT d.SUBINVENTORY_CODE, l.SEGMENT1 || '.' || l.SEGMENT2 || '.' || l.SEGMENT3 AS LOCATOR, d.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY FROM MTL_ONHAND_QUANTITIES_DETAIL d JOIN MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS l ON d.LOCATOR_ID = l.INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID JOIN MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B i ON d.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = i.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID WHERE i.SEGMENT1 = :item_number

example_queries.description: Get all material issues for a specific item in the last week.
example_queries.sql: SELECT t.TRANSACTION_DATE, t.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, t.SUBINVENTORY_CODE FROM MTL_MATERIAL_TRANSACTIONS t JOIN MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B i ON t.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = i.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID WHERE i.SEGMENT1 = :item_number AND t.TRANSACTION_ACTION_ID = 1 AND t.TRANSACTION_DATE >= SYSDATE - 7
